goal_alignment: Expose a MORI-owned balanced-MoE compact dispatch API that consumes the MORI source partition directly, moving training/inference callers away from loose hot/cold adapter arguments.

source_changes.change: Added BalancedMoeCompactDispatchOutput and EpDispatchCombineOp.dispatch_balanced_moe_compact(...), which consumes a BalancedMoeSourcePartition-like object and returns named normal/cold plus helper-hot outputs.
Added a CPU contract test for BalancedMoeCompactDispatchOutput.

validation.command: from mori.ops import BalancedMoeCompactDispatchOutput, EpDispatchCombineOp; hasattr(EpDispatchCombineOp, 'dispatch_balanced_moe_compact')

remote_notes.reason: This was an API/ABI consolidation step and does not yet change the lower-level compact collective layout.

next_steps: Wire a small TorchTitan opt-in call path through EpDispatchCombineOp.dispatch_balanced_moe_compact for a non-throughput smoke, if needed.
Move below this Python API into MORI C++/HIP: consume BalancedMoeSourcePartition to produce the final expert-major receive layout directly.
Add low-intrusion profile counters around native compact body/final layout before any long 8x throughput gate.
